heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers likely north, becoming scattered in the south; chance of a thunderstorm west of the Greens. Highs from the mid 50s to around 60, except low to mid 50s northeast, and low to mid 60s far south. South to southeast winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph west of the Greens.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy, with scattered showers; a rumble of thunder possible, mainly south. Lows from the mid 40s to around 50, some lower 40s northeast. Southeast winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph early west of the Greens, then diminishing.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers likely, with a thunderstorm possible. Highs from the mid 50s to around 60, some lower 50s in the Adirondacks. Southeast winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming east.
